message:
Close bd-31e1f: Robot Diagnose Command implemented

The --robot-diagnose command provides comprehensive health checks with:
- Health classification: healthy, rate_limited, unresponsive, crashed, unknown
- Overall session health: healthy, degraded, critical
- Per-pane diagnostics with actionable recommendations
- Auto-fix support via --diagnose-fix flag
- Brief mode via --diagnose-brief flag
- Single pane focus via --diagnose-pane=N

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
